title: Mount Everest is NOT the Tallest Mountain
description:
Mount Everest is NOT the tallest mountain in the world!

There are at least 3 ways to measure the tallest mountain and Everest only wins one…

So here are the 3 tallest contenders and by the end, you vote on which is the real winner.

Subscribe and tell me, which is your vote?

Correction: this video has a corrected image for Chimborazo!“

#everest #mountain #earth #tallest #shorts
